queries.question: Show me $150 wellness programs and $150 day spas.
queries.sql:
SELECT Day_Spa.name
FROM Day_Spa
WHERE Day_Spa.Price = 150
UNION
SELECT Wellness_Retreat.name
FROM Wellness_Retreat
WHERE Wellness_Retreat.Price = 150
